meta.summary: Python command suite for RNA-seq quality-control metrics from SAM/BAM alignments and BED/GTF annotations.
meta.description: Python command suite for RNA-seq quality-control metrics from SAM/BAM alignments and BED/GTF annotations.

test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata; print(importlib.metadata.version("RSeQC"))')" = '5.0.4' && bam_stat.py --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'bam_stat.py 5.0.4' >/dev/null && bam_stat.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Summarizing mapping statistics' >/dev/null && infer_experiment.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Input alignment file in SAM or BAM format' >/dev/null && geneBody_coverage.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Reference gene model in bed format' >/dev/null && sc_seqLogo.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'DNA sequence logo' >/dev/null && htseq-count --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'htseq-count' >/dev/null && Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript' >/dev/null && awk --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'GNU Awk' >/dev/null && python -c 'import qcmodule, pysam, bx, numpy, pyBigWig, logomaker, matplotlib' && grep -F 'source_sha256=b7f3996f3de0b0b0a09eec949281a8f3e665a20827fcb3cbbd7546b94574a088' /opt/rseqc/share/doc/rseqc/source.txt >/dev/null && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH='/opt/rseqc/venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/numpy.libs:/opt/rseqc/venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/pillow.libs' && find /opt/rseqc/venv -type f -name '*.so' -print0 | xargs -0 -r ldd > /tmp/taf-rseqc-ldd.txt && grep -F 'libc.so' /tmp/taf-rseqc-ldd.txt >/dev/null && if grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-rseqc-ldd.txt; then exit 1; fi

tmp=/tmp/taf-rseqc-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; python -c 'import pysam; header={"HD":{"VN":"1.6","SO":"coordinate"},"SQ":[{"SN":"chr1","LN":1000}]}; out=pysam.AlignmentFile("tiny.bam","wb",header=header); a=pysam.AlignedSegment(); a.query_name="r1"; a.query_sequence="ACGT"*12+"AC"; a.flag=0; a.reference_id=0; a.reference_start=100; a.mapping_quality=60; a.cigar=[(0,50)]; a.query_qualities=pysam.qualitystring_to_array("I"*50); out.write(a); out.close(); pysam.index("tiny.bam")' && printf 'chr1\t90\t220\tgene1\t0\t+\t90\t220\t0\t1\t130\t0\n' > genes.bed && bam_stat.py -i tiny.bam > bam_stat.out && grep -F 'Total records:' bam_stat.out >/dev/null && grep -F 'mapq >= mapq_cut (unique):' bam_stat.out >/dev/null && infer_experiment.py -i tiny.bam -r genes.bed -s 10 > infer.out 2>&1 && grep -E 'This is SingleEnd Data|Unknown Data type' infer.out >/dev/null && read_distribution.py -i tiny.bam -r genes.bed > distribution.out && grep -F 'Total Reads' distribution.out >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-rseqc-plot-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; python -c 'import pysam; header={"HD":{"VN":"1.6","SO":"coordinate"},"SQ":[{"SN":"chr1","LN":1000}]}; out=pysam.AlignmentFile("tiny.bam","wb",header=header); a=pysam.AlignedSegment(); a.query_name="r1"; a.query_sequence="ACGT"*12+"AC"; a.flag=0; a.reference_id=0; a.reference_start=100; a.mapping_quality=60; a.cigar=[(0,50)]; a.query_qualities=pysam.qualitystring_to_array("I"*50); out.write(a); out.close(); pysam.index("tiny.bam")' && read_GC.py -i tiny.bam -o gc > gc.out 2>&1 && test -s gc.GC.xls && test -s gc.GC_plot.r && test -s gc.GC_plot.pdf && grep -F 'pdf(' gc.GC_plot.r >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-rseqc-logo-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '@r1
ACGTACGT
+
IIIIIIII
@r2
ACGTTCGT
+
IIIIIIII
' > reads.fq && sc_seqLogo.py -i reads.fq --iformat fq --oformat png --font-name 'DejaVu Sans' -n 2 -o logo > logo.out 2>&1 && test -s logo.count_matrix.csv && test -s logo.logo.png && test -s logo.logo.mean_centered.png

upstream.name: RSeQC
upstream.citation: Wang, Wang and Li 2012; Wang et al. 2016

ACGTACGT
